name: mcp_connect
description: MCP Connect is a versatile command-line interface (CLI) client designed to connect to various Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers using stdio transport. It provides seamless integration with OpenAI models and supports dynamic tool and resource management across multiple servers.

pm_override.reason: PM+SecM: all 5 critical findings are FPs (docs/tests). MCP framework client that legitimately spawns subprocess MCP servers. Prior SecM audit confirmed.

agent_b.comment: 330 files analyzed. Found: 41 network, 81 file, 98 env, 30 system calls. Primary: python.

agent_c_star.comment: 425 findings: 5 critical, 84 high, 203 medium, 133 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 425 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
